---
title: "ART Capacity Balance"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML, display
import plotly.graph_objects as go

_candidates = [Path("quarto-data/art-capacity-balance.json"), Path("../quarto-data/art-capacity-balance.json")]
data_file = next((p for p in _candidates if p.exists()), None)
if data_file is None:
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "quarto-data/art-capacity-balance.json not found. "
        "Run: python NceGitLab.py --report art-capacity-balance"
    )

d     = json.loads(data_file.read_text())
group = d["group"]
arts  = d["arts"]

STATUS_COLORS = {
    "🔴 Over":     "#ef4444",
    "🟡 High":     "#f59e0b",
    "✅ Balanced": "#22c55e",
    "🔵 Under":    "#3b82f6",
    "—":           "#9ca3af",
}
```

```{python}
HTML(f"""
<p>
  <strong>Report Date:</strong> {d['report_date']} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
  <strong>Group:</strong> <a href="{group['url']}" target="_blank">{group['name']}</a>
</p>
<p>Per-team planned vs actual capacity by Program Increment for each ART.
Load% = Actual ÷ Planned × 100.</p>""")
```

## 📊 Planned vs Actual Capacity

Planned (gray) vs Actual (color-coded by Load% status) story points per team per PI.
Hover for Load%, delta, and full team details.

```{python}
if not arts:
    display(HTML("<p><em>No ART capacity data found.</em></p>"))
else:
    for art in arts:
        # Build (pi_label / team_name) rows — PI order is chronological from data layer
        rows_data = []
        for pi in art["pis"]:
            for t in pi["teams"]:
                delta_str = f"+{t['delta']}" if t['delta'] > 0 else str(t['delta'])
                rows_data.append({
                    "label":   f"{pi['piid']}  /  {t['name']}",
                    "planned": t["planned"],
                    "actual":  t["actual"],
                    "color":   STATUS_COLORS.get(t["status"], "#9ca3af"),
                    "hover": (
                        f"<b>{t['name']}</b><br>"
                        f"PI: {pi['piid']}<br>"
                        f"Planned: {t['planned']} pt<br>"
                        f"Actual: {t['actual']} pt<br>"
                        f"Δ: {delta_str} pt<br>"
                        f"Load%: {t['load_pct']}%<br>"
                        f"Status: {t['status']}"
                    ),
                })

        if not rows_data:
            continue

        labels  = [r["label"]   for r in rows_data]
        planned = [r["planned"] for r in rows_data]
        actual  = [r["actual"]  for r in rows_data]
        colors  = [r["color"]   for r in rows_data]
        hovers  = [r["hover"]   for r in rows_data]

        fig = go.Figure()
        fig.add_trace(go.Bar(
            name="Planned",
            y=labels,
            x=planned,
            orientation="h",
            marker_color="#d1d5db",
            opacity=0.85,
            hovertemplate="Planned: %{x} pt<extra></extra>",
        ))
        fig.add_trace(go.Bar(
            name="Actual",
            y=labels,
            x=actual,
            orientation="h",
            marker=dict(color=colors),
            opacity=0.9,
            hovertext=hovers,
            hoverinfo="text",
        ))

        fig.update_layout(
            title=dict(text=f"🔷 {art['vs_name']}  ›  {art['art_name']}", font=dict(size=14)),
            barmode="group",
            height=max(320, len(rows_data) * 36 + 100),
            margin=dict(l=280, r=40, t=60, b=50),
            xaxis_title="Story Points",
            yaxis=dict(autorange="reversed"),
            plot_bgcolor="#f9fafb",
            paper_bgcolor="white",
            font=dict(size=12),
            legend=dict(orientation="h", yanchor="bottom", y=1.02, xanchor="right", x=1),
        )
        fig.show()
```

## 📉 Load% by Team

Load% bars color-coded by status. Reference lines: 80% (Under threshold), 100% (plan), 120% (Over threshold).

```{python}
if not arts:
    display(HTML("<p><em>No ART capacity data found.</em></p>"))
else:
    for art in arts:
        rows_data = []
        for pi in art["pis"]:
            for t in pi["teams"]:
                delta_str = f"+{t['delta']}" if t['delta'] > 0 else str(t['delta'])
                rows_data.append({
                    "label":    f"{pi['piid']}  /  {t['name']}",
                    "load_pct": t["load_pct"],
                    "color":    STATUS_COLORS.get(t["status"], "#9ca3af"),
                    "hover": (
                        f"<b>{t['name']}</b><br>"
                        f"PI: {pi['piid']}<br>"
                        f"Load%: {t['load_pct']}%<br>"
                        f"Status: {t['status']}<br>"
                        f"Planned: {t['planned']} pt  ·  Actual: {t['actual']} pt  ·  Δ {delta_str} pt"
                    ),
                })

        if not rows_data:
            continue

        labels   = [r["label"]    for r in rows_data]
        load_pct = [r["load_pct"] for r in rows_data]
        colors   = [r["color"]    for r in rows_data]
        hovers   = [r["hover"]    for r in rows_data]

        fig = go.Figure()
        fig.add_trace(go.Bar(
            y=labels,
            x=load_pct,
            orientation="h",
            marker=dict(color=colors),
            hovertext=hovers,
            hoverinfo="text",
            showlegend=False,
        ))

        x_max = max(max(load_pct, default=0) * 1.15, 130)
        for val, label_text, color in [
            (80,  "80% — Under",  "#3b82f6"),
            (100, "100% — Plan",  "#6b7280"),
            (120, "120% — Over",  "#ef4444"),
        ]:
            fig.add_vline(
                x=val, line_dash="dot", line_color=color, line_width=1.5,
                annotation_text=label_text,
                annotation_position="top",
                annotation_font_size=10,
                annotation_font_color=color,
            )

        fig.update_layout(
            title=dict(text=f"🔷 {art['vs_name']}  ›  {art['art_name']}  — Load%", font=dict(size=14)),
            height=max(320, len(rows_data) * 36 + 100),
            margin=dict(l=280, r=60, t=70, b=50),
            xaxis_title="Load%",
            xaxis=dict(range=[0, x_max]),
            yaxis=dict(autorange="reversed"),
            plot_bgcolor="#f9fafb",
            paper_bgcolor="white",
            font=dict(size=12),
        )
        fig.show()
```

## Detail Tables

```{python}
if not arts:
    display(HTML("<p><em>No ART capacity data found. Ensure Features have planned weights and are assigned to teams via PIID labels.</em></p>"))
else:
    html = ""
    current_vs = None
    for art in arts:
        if art["vs_name"] != current_vs:
            html += f"<h2>🔷 {art['vs_name']}</h2>"
            current_vs = art["vs_name"]

        art_link = f'<a href="{art["art_url"]}" target="_blank">{art["art_name"]}</a>' if art["art_url"] else art["art_name"]
        flags = []
        if art["over_count"]:
            flags.append(f"🔴 {art['over_count']} over-capacity")
        if art["under_count"]:
            flags.append(f"🔵 {art['under_count']} under-capacity")
        flag_str = " &nbsp;·&nbsp; ".join(flags)
        html += f"<h3>{art_link}"
        if flag_str:
            html += f" &nbsp;<small>{flag_str}</small>"
        html += "</h3>"

        for pi in art["pis"]:
            html += f"<h4>{pi['piid']}"
            if pi["date_range"]:
                html += f" <small><em>{pi['date_range']}</em></small>"
            html += "</h4>"
            html += '<table class="table table-sm table-bordered"><thead><tr>'
            html += "<th>Team</th><th>Planned</th><th>Actual</th><th>Δ</th><th>Load%</th><th>Status</th>"
            html += "</tr></thead><tbody>"
            for t in pi["teams"]:
                tlink   = f'<a href="{t["url"]}" target="_blank">{t["name"]}</a>' if t["url"] else t["name"]
                delta   = t["delta"]
                d_str   = f"▲{delta}" if delta > 0 else (f"▼{abs(delta)}" if delta < 0 else "=")
                html += f"<tr><td>{tlink}</td><td>{t['planned']} pt</td><td>{t['actual']} pt</td><td>{d_str}</td><td>{t['load_pct']}%</td><td>{t['status']}</td></tr>"
            html += "</tbody></table>"
    display(HTML(html))
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Status Thresholds

| Status | Load% | Meaning |
|--------|-------|---------|
| 🔴 Over | > 120% | Actual work significantly exceeds planned capacity |
| 🟡 High | 101–120% | Slightly over plan — monitor closely |
| ✅ Balanced | 80–100% | Actual work aligns with planned capacity |
| 🔵 Under | < 80% | Team has more capacity than committed work |

**Planned** — sum of planned weights on Features assigned to this team for the PI.
**Actual** — sum of story-point weights on all issues linked to those Features.
**Δ** — Actual minus Planned: ▲ more · ▼ less · = matched.
:::
